title: Category:M. C. Escher
text: Maurits (M.C.) Escher, around Nov. 23, 1971 Maurits Cornelis Escher , (June 17, 1898 – March 27, 1972) was a Dutch graphic artist who made mathematically-inspired woodcuts , lithographs , and mezzotints .
